message:
🐛 Fix React context errors by bundling all React libs in vendor

All libraries that use React hooks/context must be in the same chunk
to share the React instance. Splitting them separately causes:
- "useLayoutEffect undefined" (dnd-kit)
- "createContext undefined" (react-markdown)

Now only three.js core (non-React) is split separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
